ja_transcribed: ドアの[鍵|かぎ]、ちゃんとかけてね。
en: Make sure you lock the door.

ja_transcribed: ここにいっぱい[玩具|おもちゃ]があるよ。
en: There are a lot of toys here.

ja_transcribed: お[風呂|ふ|ろ][洗|あら]って、[入|い]れといてね。
en: In preparation, clean the bath and fill it.
In preparation, clean and fill the bath tub.
In preparation, clean and run a bath.

ja_transcribed: お[風呂|ふ|ろ]に[入|はい]ってから[寝|ね]るのよ。
en: Take a bath and then go to bed.

ja_transcribed: その[玩具|おもちゃ]は[木|き]でできてるんだ。
en: That toy is made of wood.

ja_transcribed: [１|いち][日|にち][１|いっ][回|かい]はお[風呂|ふ|ろ]に[入|はい]ります。
en: I take a bath once a day.
I bathe once a day.

ja_transcribed: そこに[椅子|い|す]を[置|お]くんじゃない。
en: Don't put the chair there.

ja_transcribed: [鍵|かぎ]はソファーの[下|した]にあったよ。
en: I found my keys under the couch.
The key was under the couch.
The keys were under the couch.
The keys were under the sofa.
The key was under the sofa.

ja_transcribed: [新|あたら]しい[椅子|い|す]を[買|か]おうと[思|おも]って。
en: I'm going to buy a new chair.
I'm thinking about buying a new chair.

ja_transcribed: [全|すべ]てのドアに[鍵|かぎ]をかけました。
en: We locked all the doors.
I locked all the doors.

ja_transcribed: ドアには[鍵|かぎ]をかけないんだよ。
en: We don't lock our doors.

ja_transcribed: [家|いえ]の[鍵|かぎ]はかかっていなかった。
en: The house was unlocked.

ja_transcribed: お[風呂|ふ|ろ]の[水|みず]は[飲|の]んじゃダメよ。
en: Don't drink the bathwater.
